name: setColumnWidths
description: Sets the width (in pixels) of one or more columns in a spreadsheet. Accepts multiple column specs in a single call, each targeting a single column or a contiguous range (e.g., "A", "B:D").

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

sheetName.description: Name of the sheet/tab. Defaults to the first sheet if not provided.

column.description: Column or column range in A1 notation (e.g., "A", "B:D").

width.description: Width in pixels. Use 0 to hide the column.

columnWidths.description: List of column width specifications to apply.
